name: brainrot-creations
description: Official Brainrot Creations plugins for Claude Code — social media automation and collective browser intelligence

plugins.name: hive
plugins.description: Collective browser automation intelligence. Share and discover reliable methods for web interactions across the Claude agent network.

plugins.name: socials
plugins.description: Connect Claude to X, LinkedIn, and Reddit via the Socials browser extension. Post, engage, search, and manage social media directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Fast native browser automation for AI agents. Navigate, screenshot, fill forms, click, and extract data from any webpage via Chrome DevTools Protocol.
